about.title: About Us
about.description: Siren is a dynamic fashion brand that combines bold elegance with a vibrant sense of individuality. Drawing inspiration from the allure and power of the mythical siren, the brand creates pieces that are as captivating as they are empowering. Each collection from The Siren Official reflects a unique blend of contemporary design with timeless, ethereal elements, creating a wardrobe that appeals to the modern woman who is not afraid to make a statement.
about.description2: Siren emphasizes the importance of embracing one’s inner strength and expressing it through fashion. With a focus on striking silhouettes, luxurious fabrics and meticulously crafted details, the brand offers more than just clothing – it offers a way to make a statement. The pieces are designed to exude confidence, sophistication and an unapologetic attitude. Whether you are looking for a bold outfit for a special occasion or an iconic piece for your everyday collection, The Siren ensures that every piece you wear reflects the essence of empowerment and elegance.
about.description3: Founded with a mission to redefine modern femininity, The Siren is dedicated to creating fashion that resonates with women who drive both style and substance. The brand's commitment to quality and innovation is evident in every piece, making it the ultimate choice for those who value luxury, originality, and the power of self-expression.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions
Terms.intro: We ship orders throughout Ukraine (except temporarily occupied territories).

novaPoshta.title: 1. Nova Poshta
novaPoshta.description: The fastest way to receive your order.
novaPoshta.item1: To a branch — according to carrier rates (from 70 UAH).
novaPoshta.item2: Courier address delivery — to your door anywhere in Ukraine.

ukrposhta.title: 2. Ukrposhta (Express or Standard)
ukrposhta.description: A budget delivery option with the largest branch network.
ukrposhta.item1: To a branch — according to carrier rates (from 35–40 UAH).
ukrposhta.item2: Delivery time: 3–7 days depending on the selected rate and region from dispatch

shippingSchedule.title: ⏰ Shipping Schedule & Timelines
shippingSchedule.item1: Orders for in-stock items are shipped the same day.
shippingSchedule.item2: Orders for out-of-stock items are shipped within 10-11 days
shippingSchedule.item3: After dispatch you will automatically receive an SMS or messenger notification with the tracking number (TTN) for parcel tracking.

payment.title: 💳 Payment Methods
payment.intro: You can choose the most convenient payment method for you:
payment.onlineTitle: Online payment on the website (Monobank / LiqPay):
payment.onlineContent: Fast and secure payment by Visa or MasterCard, as well as via Apple Pay / Google Pay. No additional fees.
payment.ibanContent: After order confirmation, the manager will send you official payment details for use in your banking app (Privat24, Monobank, etc.).
payment.codContent: Payment upon receipt at a Nova Poshta branch.
payment.codNote: Important: Nova Poshta charges a money transfer fee (20 UAH + 2% of the order amount).
payment.prepayment: The store reserves the right to request a prepayment of 200 UAH for bulky items or customers with a low reliability rating

receiving.title: 🔍 Important upon receipt!
receiving.content: Please be sure to check the integrity and completeness of the product directly at the delivery service branch or in the presence of the courier.
receiving.ifDamaged: If you discover damage or a discrepancy with your order:
receiving.step2: Draw up a claim act together with the delivery service employee.
receiving.step3: Take photos of the damage and contact our support team by phone: +380977099015

international.title: International Delivery
international.intro: We are happy to ship our products worldwide! Below you will find detailed information regarding shipping methods, delivery times, and payment options for international orders.
international.methodsIntro: Shipping is carried out by reliable postal and courier services from Ukraine.
international.ukrposhtaDescription: The most cost-effective option for small and medium-sized parcels. Once it crosses the border, the parcel is handled by the state postal service of your country (e.g., USPS in the USA, Deutsche Post in Germany, Royal Mail in the UK, etc.).
international.ukrposhtaGeography: 📍 Geography: Worldwide (excluding the aggressor countries: the Russian Federation and the Republic of Belarus).
international.ukrposhtaDelivery3: Rest of the world: 15–30 business days.
international.ukrposhtaCost: 💰 Shipping Cost: Calculated automatically at checkout based on the parcel's weight and destination country ($15 / €14).
international.novaPostDescription: The fastest and most convenient method for shipping to European countries where Nova Post branches are already operating, as well as for courier delivery in other regions.
international.novaPostGeography: 📍 Geography: EU countries (Poland, Germany, Czech Republic, Lithuania, etc.) — delivery to branches, parcel lockers, or by courier.
international.novaPostDelivery: ⏰ Delivery Times: 3–10 business days (significantly faster than standard mail).
international.novaPostCost: 💰 Shipping Cost: According to Nova Post rates (depends on dimensions and destination country).
international.expressDelivery: ⏰ Delivery Times: 2–5 business days to anywhere in the world.
international.expressCost: 💰 Shipping Cost: Calculated individually by our manager.
international.paymentContent1: International orders are shipped exclusively on a 100% prepayment basis (including shipping costs). Cash on Delivery (COD) is not available for international shipments.
international.paymentContent2: You can pay for your order in your preferred currency ($ USD, € EUR, ₴ UAH):
international.paymentOnlineContent: Via secure payment gateways (LiqPay, Mono-acquiring) using Visa / MasterCard, as well as Apple Pay and Google Pay.
international.customsContent1: Please Note! The shipping cost does not include customs duties, import taxes (such as VAT), or brokerage fees that may be charged by your country's customs office upon arrival.
international.customsContent2: Each country has its own limits for duty-free import (for instance, in EU countries, VAT is charged from the first euro cent if the parcel is not sent via the IOSS system).
international.customsContent3: All additional customs clearance fees are the sole responsibility of the buyer.
international.customsContent4: Please familiarize yourself with your country's customs regulations prior to purchasing. If a parcel is returned due to the buyer's refusal to pay customs duties, the round-trip shipping cost will not be refunded.
international.trackingContentBefore: Once your parcel is handed over to the logistics company, we will send you a Tracking Number via email or messenger. You can track your shipment on the carrier's website or using universal tracking services (e.g.,
international.returnsContent1: In accordance with legislation, you can return an item within 14 days of receipt, provided it is unused and retains its original commercial appearance.
international.returnsContent2: For international returns or exchanges, all return shipping costs are covered by the buyer, except in cases where the return is due to a manufacturing defect or an error on our part.
international.contactsIntro: If you have any questions regarding shipping to your country, please drop us a line, and we will find the best solution for you!

support.intro: If you have difficulties placing an order or need assistance, we are always here to help:

section1.title: 🔄 Returns & Exchanges
section1.content: In accordance with legislation, you can return an item within 14 days of receipt, provided it is unused and retains its original commercial appearance.

section2.title: International Orders
section2.content: For international returns or exchanges, all return shipping costs are covered by the buyer, except in cases where the return is due to a manufacturing defect or an error on our part.

section3.title: How to Initiate a Return
section3.content: To process a return or exchange, please contact us within 14 days of receiving the goods.
section3.step2: Provide your order number and reason for return
section3.step3: Receive shipping instructions from the manager

contact.title: Contacts
contact.content: For return and exchange inquiries, please contact:

Contacts.title: Contacts
Contacts.subtitle: If you have difficulties placing an order or need assistance, we are always here to help:
